title: MSCI official website
note: Primary company website describing MSCI's investment data, index, analytics, ESG, climate, and private assets businesses.

title: MSCI 2024 Annual Report
note: Core source for business segments, financial profile, benchmark AUM context, and moat assessment.

title: MSCI Indexes
note: Primary product source for MSCI's benchmark and index franchise.

title: Barra Models
note: Primary product source for Barra risk model capabilities and positioning.

title: Barra Global Equity Model
note: Source for Barra factor-model scope and delivery context.

title: MSCI Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization source for the registry snapshot and market-cap metric.

title: MSCI Inc. Financials
note: Source for revenue, net income, and margin context used in profitability scoring.

title: MSCI Inc PE Ratio 2012-2026
note: Valuation reference for the speculative P/E estimate.

title: QuantLib
note: Open-source quantitative finance library used as a plausible replacement component for proprietary analytics workflows.

title: Open Source Risk Engine
note: Open-source risk analytics engine based on QuantLib, relevant to Barra risk model alternatives.

title: OpenBB Open Data Platform
note: Open-source investment research and data integration platform relevant to open benchmark and analytics workflows.

title: OpenBB GitHub organization
note: Repository source for OpenBB's open-source investment research tooling.

title: OpenFIGI Features
note: Source for open symbology and identifier mapping capabilities that can support open benchmark infrastructure.

title: OpenFIGI API
note: API documentation source for instrument mapping workflows.

title: Bloomberg Launches Online Request Utility and New Mapping Tools for FIGI
note: Source for FIGI's public-domain and open-standard positioning.
